name: Asmitha T M
subtitle: First, you know my name. Then, you know my world. Then, you know my heart. Then, you know my dreams.

deskItems.label: Listening To:
deskItems.content: Sitar, hindustani classical music, Bollywood music and playlists that match the weather.

deskItems.label: Building:
deskItems.content: Software products, side projects, and occasionally ambitious plans.

deskItems.label: Creating:
deskItems.content: Sketches, paintings, and unfinished creative experiments.

deskItems.label: Doing:
deskItems.content: Trying to balance fitness, badminton, hobbies, and adult responsibilities.

layer1.title: The World Sees
layer1.description: The world usually begins with facts. Here is the outline of my professional journey, upbringing roots, and daily stats.
layer1.caption: Layer 1: Outward Identities
layer1.education: B.Tech in Computer Science from a top-tier institution in Karnataka, with a deep appreciation for logical problem-solving and systems design.
layer1.career: Working as a Senior Frontend/Full Stack Engineer, crafting intuitive human experiences at a modern technology firm. Balancing analytical rigor with creative expression.

layer2.title: Places I've Called Home
layer2.subtitle: A few cities, a few chapters, and one continuing journey.
layer2.caption: Layer 2: Places I've Called Home
layer2.description: No story is built alone. Behind every chapter are the people, traditions, and values that helped shape it. Here is a small glimpse into the family and roots I come from.

chapters.longDesc: Born in Dharwad, where the first page of my journey was quietly written.

chapters.shortDesc: The city of my childhood years.
chapters.longDesc: School days at DAV Public School. Filled with growing school-day curiosity, exploring the heritage lanes, and nurturing many of my earliest beautiful memories.
Academics that slowly shaped my career path. Pursued learning with deep focus at JSS Shri Manjunatheshwara Central School, Hanchinamani PUC College, and SDM College Of Engineering.
Working at Mercedes Benz Research & Development India. A phase characterized by professional work, independent growth, and everything still beautiful and unfolding.

creativeProjects.title: Sitar & Silence
creativeProjects.description: Learning classical Indian Sitar has taught me that the spaces between notes — the silence — are as critical as the strums themselves.

creativeProjects.title: Bharatanatyam
creativeProjects.description: A disciplined container of storytelling, rhythm, and devotion. Moving my body to complex rhythms brings a deep emotional grounding.

creativeProjects.title: Painting & Sketches
creativeProjects.description: An escape to colors. Creating abstract oils and traditional Tanjore art allows my analytical mind to take a back seat.

creativeProjects.title: Curious Reader
creativeProjects.description: Finding solace in classic literature, psychology journals, and spiritual commentaries that challenge my daily perspective.

creativeProjects.title: Weekend Badminton
creativeProjects.description: Fast-paced agility and cheerful sweat on Saturday mornings with a close-knit circle of childhood friends.

creativeProjects.title: Trekking
creativeProjects.description: Connecting with mountains, exploring new trails, and finding peace in nature's quiet vastness.

layer4.title: The Quiet Things That Shape Me
layer4.caption: Layer 4: Quiet Character
layer4.description: What stays when titles and temporary noise disappear? These are a few of the quiet anchors I keep returning to, that guide me when life gets complicated.

cards.title: Honest Conversations
cards.description: I would rather have an honest conversation than maintain a comfortable illusion. Clarity may feel difficult in the moment, but it builds trust that lasts far longer than pleasing words.

cards.title: Accountability Over Perfection
cards.description: I don't expect perfection from myself or from others. What matters more is the willingness to acknowledge mistakes, learn from them, apologize sincerely, repair where possible, and keep growing.

cards.title: Integrity When Nobody Is Watching
cards.description: I try to make decisions I can respect when I look back on them later. Doing the right thing is not always the easiest path, but it helps me sleep peacefully at night.

cards.title: Understanding Before Judgement
cards.description: I feel things deeply and sometimes react quickly. But once emotions settle, I try hard to understand every side of a situation. I'd rather seek understanding and connection than win an argument.

cards.title: Show Up And Follow Through
cards.description: To me, responsibility is one of the simplest forms of love. Showing up when needed, keeping promises where possible, and doing my part are some of the ways I try to care for the people around me.

cards.title: Partners, Not Roles
cards.description: I believe a strong relationship is built through partnership. Whether it is careers, household responsibilities, family commitments, or future plans, both people contribute, support one another, and grow together.

cards.title: Never Stop Growing
cards.description: Curiosity shapes much of who I am. I enjoy learning about technology, psychology, spirituality, art, and people. Growth is not a destination for me. It is a lifelong journey.

layer4.memoText: I take my values seriously, but not myself. Life is lighter when there is laughter, curiosity, good company, and a little room for silliness.
layer4.disclaimerText1: Despite all the serious principles mapped in the compass above, I am not walking around giving TED Talks or grading people on their moral coordinates.
layer4.disclaimerText2: I laugh loudly, get excited about completely minor details, ask far too many questions, and occasionally become emotionally invested in entirely unnecessary topics of curiosity.

layer5.title: Personality Constellation
layer5.caption: Layer 5: Personality Snapshots
layer5.description: The facts tell one story. The values tell another. Somewhere in between lives the person I am on ordinary Tuesdays, difficult days, joyful moments, and everything in between.

items.title: Deep Feelings, Deep Connections
items.reflection: I experience life intensely and form meaningful connections with the people I care about. Relationships are rarely casual for me. When someone becomes important, I naturally invest my time, attention, and heart into that bond.

items.title: Thoughtful, Not Surface-Level
items.reflection: I rarely stop at the first answer. Whether it is people, emotions, decisions, or life itself, I am naturally drawn to understanding what lies beneath the surface and why things are the way they are. Curiosity tends to follow me into almost every conversation.

items.title: Equal Parts Logic And Creativity
items.reflection: By profession, I write code and solve problems. Outside work, you'll usually find me painting, reading, playing the sitar, dancing to unwind, or disappearing into a new idea. I enjoy having one foot in structure and the other in imagination.

items.title: Curiosity Is My Default Setting
items.reflection: Psychology, spirituality, human behaviour, technology, culture, relationships, astronomy, art... I genuinely enjoy learning. A simple question can send me down an unexpected rabbit hole for hours, and somehow I usually emerge with ten more questions than I started with.

items.title: Warmth, Laughter, And Questionable Humor
items.reflection: Despite all the introspection, I am not serious all the time. I enjoy memes, playful banter, random observations, and laughing at things that probably shouldn't be funny. Life feels lighter when there is room for curiosity, kindness, and a healthy amount of nonsense.

items.title: Real Over Polished
items.reflection: I have never been particularly good at pretending. What you see is usually what you get. I appreciate authenticity, honest conversations, and people who are comfortable being themselves. I'd rather be real than impressive.

items.title: Bollywood at Heart (A Little Bit Filmy)
items.reflection: I may be practical about life, but somewhere inside me lives a person who still pauses for beautiful sunsets, gets emotionally invested in movie scenes, and occasionally imagines background music during important life moments.

items.title: Mindfully Inward & Self-Reflective
items.reflection: I spend a fair amount of time reflecting on my choices, emotions, and experiences. This helps me learn and grow, although it occasionally means I can turn a simple thought into a full-length internal documentary.

layer6.title: The Life I Hope To Build
layer6.caption: Layer 6: The Blueprint of a Home
layer6.description: Not a checklist or a perfect picture. Just a few glimpses of the kind of partnership, home, and life I hope to create over time.

dreams.title: Foundation
dreams.description: Marriage, to me, is not a single event but a long-term partnership. I hope to build a life with someone who is willing to grow together, navigate challenges together, and create something meaningful that neither of us could build alone.
dreams.imageUrl: Building A Life, Not Just A Wedding

dreams.title: Living Room
dreams.description: I hope our home becomes a place where both people feel understood, respected, and accepted. Not a place without disagreements, but a place where difficult conversations can happen without fear and where repair matters more than being right.

dreams.title: Kitchen
dreams.description: I don't dream of doing everything alone, nor do I expect someone else to. I hope for a partnership where responsibilities, decisions, and everyday life are approached as a team effort.

dreams.title: Dining Space
dreams.description: Some of my favourite moments are surprisingly ordinary. Sharing a meal after a long day, discussing something interesting, laughing over something silly, going for a walk, or simply enjoying each other's company without needing an elaborate plan.

dreams.title: Family Courtyard
dreams.description: I hope to stay connected to the traditions and relationships that shaped me while creating new memories, rituals, and celebrations that belong uniquely to our own family.

dreams.title: Study
dreams.description: I hope we continue encouraging each other's ambitions, interests, and personal growth. A relationship should provide stability, but it should also create space for both people to keep evolving.

dreams.title: Balcony
dreams.description: Life can be serious enough on its own. I hope for a relationship that makes room for affection, humour, inside jokes, playful moments, and the kind of companionship that makes ordinary days feel a little brighter.

dreams.title: Prayer Corner
dreams.description: I hope we build a life grounded not only in achievement, but also in gratitude, reflection, and a sense of purpose larger than ourselves.

layer7.title: The Kind of Companion I Hope to Meet
layer7.subheading: I am not looking for perfection. I simply hope to meet someone sincere and grounded, with whom we can build a meaningful life.
layer7.caption: Layer 7: The Bridge
layer7.reflection: As I peeled my own layers and understood myself better, I discovered the kind of person with whom I may build a meaningful life. Here are the pillars that guide my search:
layer7.bridgeText: As I learned more about myself, I also began to understand the kind of person with whom I may build a meaningful life. I am not looking for perfection. These lanterns simply reflect a few qualities that, in my experience, help two people build something meaningful together.
layer7.pinnedNoteTitle: 📌 Pinned near the end of the bridge
layer7.pinnedNoteText: If you've noticed, none of these qualities mention income brackets, luxury lifestyles, status symbols, or perfection. I simply believe that when two people share similar values, communicate with kindness, and are willing to grow together, many beautiful things can be built over time.
layer7.smallNoteText: While I have shared the qualities I value, I believe relationships work best when both people bring those qualities to the table. Growth, kindness, respect, responsibility, and effort are things I try to practice myself as well.
layer7.invitationText: Eight glowing lanterns line the bridge. Each holds a part of the future path she imagines. Click any lantern above to read her handwritten reflections from her personal diary.
layer7.smileTitle: Things That Would Make Me Smile

lanterns.title: Character
lanterns.reflection: Someone whose words and actions generally align. Someone who values honesty, treats people with respect, and tries to do the right thing even when it is inconvenient.

lanterns.title: Responsibility
lanterns.reflection: Someone who takes ownership of his responsibilities, follows through on commitments, and approaches life with maturity rather than avoidance.

lanterns.title: Emotional Maturity
lanterns.reflection: Someone who can regulate emotions reasonably well, communicate openly, and work through disagreements without letting ego take the lead.

lanterns.title: Partnership
lanterns.reflection: Someone who sees marriage as a partnership rather than a set of predefined roles. A person willing to contribute, communicate, and build a life together.

lanterns.title: Kindness
lanterns.reflection: Someone who is naturally compassionate, tries to understand before judging, and offers emotional support during difficult seasons of life.

lanterns.title: Growth
lanterns.reflection: Someone who remains willing to learn, adapt, and grow throughout life. Not because he is perfect, but because he values becoming better over staying comfortable.

lanterns.title: Loyalty & Boundaries
lanterns.reflection: Someone who protects the relationship, maintains healthy boundaries, and stands by what is right when it matters most.

lanterns.title: Lifestyle Compatibility
lanterns.reflection: Shared values often make everyday life simpler. A vegetarian, non-smoking lifestyle would naturally align well with my own way of living.

smileTags.text: Comfortable with both conversation and silence

storiesMeet.title: Perhaps Our Stories Meet Here
storiesMeet.subtitle: THE ROAD AHEAD
storiesMeet.paragraph1: Every meaningful connection begins with a simple conversation.
storiesMeet.paragraph2: You now know far more than my profession, education, hobbies, or qualifications. You've seen the values I hold, the life I hope to build, and the person behind the profile.
storiesMeet.paragraph3: If some part of this story resonated with you, I'd be happy to hear yours too. After all, every meaningful relationship begins with a simple conversation.
storiesMeet.letterBody: Thank you for lingering in this digital space. Connecting on common ground is rare, and I look forward to hearing from you.
storiesMeet.thankYouFooterText: Thank you for spending time with my story. 🌸
storiesMeet.deskClosedEnvelopeText: If you feel our values resonate, I'd love to hear your story too.
storiesMeet.deskLetterTitle: Tell Me A Little About Yourself
storiesMeet.deskSuccessText: Thank you for taking the time to write. If our stories are meant to continue, perhaps this won't be the last page.

core.glowingQuote: I am not searching for a flawless person.
core.concludingText: I am hoping to meet someone sincere, grounded, emotionally steady, and ready to build a beautiful ordinary life. Because ordinary days, lived with the right person, become extraordinary.
